text_original: Edit: taking three stars off with the new update. changing the models of a.i. for people that have already paid for a lifetime subscription and then charging paid currency makes this app less enjoyable. erasing paid currency generating content feels bad. makes me regret paying for a lifetime subscription because every feature they add ends up costing more money.
text_zh: 编辑：由于新更新，扣除三颗星。对于已经购买终身订阅的用户更改AI模型，并使用付费货币收费，让这款应用变得不那么有趣。删除付费货币生成内容的感觉很不好，这让我后悔购买了终身订阅，因为每次新增的功能最终都会让用户花更多的钱。
reply_original: Hi there, we understand your frustration with the recent changes. The AI model updates aim to enhance experiences, but we regret any inconvenience caused. Please share specific concerns via support@fantachat.ai — we’ll address them promptly. Your feedback is invaluable, and we’re committed to improving!
reply_zh: 您好，我们理解您对近期更改的不满。AI模型更新旨在提升体验，但对此给您带来的不便，我们深表歉意。请通过support@fantachat.ai提交具体问题——我们将及时处理。您的反馈对我们至关重要，我们致力于持续改进！
